news.t: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Completes Conversion of Four Mutual Funds to ETFs

overview.description: The JPMorgan Sustainable Municipal Income ETF (JMSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that primarily invests in sustainable municipal bonds exempt from federal income tax. The portfolio has an average weighted maturity of 3 to 15 years. JMSI was launched on Jul 14, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Completes Conversion of Four Mutual Funds to ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK , July 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the firm has successfully completed the conversion of four mutual funds to ETFs.
